zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR於1190年出生在比利時海瑙特希馬時，他的父親Allard III de Chimay30歲，母親Mathilde de Quierzy31歲。他和Agnès DU THOUR至少有1個女兒。他去世於1226年享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR于1190年出生在比利时海瑙特希馬时，他的父亲Allard III de Chimay30岁，母亲Mathilde de Quierzy31岁。他和Agnès DU THOUR至少有1个女儿。他去世于1226年享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: CHIMAY
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Amerindian (Mexico): from the root of Nahuatl (Aztec) chimalli ‘shield’.

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: THOUR
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Erland, Eyvind, Nels.  Southeast Asian Chor, Tong, Chia, Chu, Kong, Seng, Tou, Chee, Ching, Chou, Chue, Eng, Thai, Moua, Neng, Pao, Yeng, Yer, Blong, Chong, Choua, Houa, Shoua, Soua.
Swedish and Danish: from a short form of any of various Scandinavian personal names containing the first element Thor (Old Norse Thórr), the name of the god of thunder in Scandinavian mythology.
English: from the Anglo-Scandinavian name Thōr, Thūr, probably short forms of Old Norse compound names in Thór-, Thúr- (see 1 above).

variants.name: Thorsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Thor, Niels, Lars, Anders, Arnt, Erik, Iver, Jarl, Knute, Magnar, Oystein, Viggo.
Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name   Thor  .

variants.name: Thoren
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Hilmer, Lennart.
Swedish (Thorén): ornamental name composed of the personal name Thor + the adjectival suffix -én, a derivative of Latin -enius ‘relating to’.

variants.name: Thoresen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Birgit, Borge, Britt, Lars, Nils, Paal, Thoralf.
Danish and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name   Thor  .

variants.name: Thorsell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Erik.

Swedish: ornamental name from the personal name Thor + possessive -s- + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius. Alternatively, the element Thors may represent a placename formed with Tors-, as for example Torshälla.

variants.name: Portmann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Helmut, Franz, Hansi, Kurt.

North German: occupational name for a gatekeeper, from Middle Low German port(e) ‘gate’ (from Latin porta) + man ‘man’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near the gates of a fortified town. Compare Porter .

variants.name: Thorell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Lennart, Nils, Algot, Bjorn, Erik.
Swedish: ornamental name from the personal name Thor + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius. Compare Torell .

variants.name: Tharaldson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian Tharaldsen: patronymic from the personal name Tharald, from Old Norse Thór(v)aldr, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + valdr ‘ruler’.

variants.name: Tellefsen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Tellef, Aane, Ingeborg, Toralf, Torleif.
Norwegian: patronymic from Tellef, a form of the Old Norse personal name Thorleifr, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + leifr ‘heir, descendant’.

variants.name: Thore
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Middlesex): chiefly from the Middle English male personal name T(h)or(e), Thure, representing Old Norse Thórir or Thóri, or Anglo-Scandinavian Thórr, all short forms of Old Norse personal names containing the first element Thór-, Thúr- ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder in Scandinavian mythology. Occasionally perhaps also from the corresponding Middle English female personal name Thore (Old Norse Thóra). This surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.
Swedish: variant of   Thor  .
French (Thoré): nickname for a strong or violent individual, derived from Old French tor ‘bull’.

variants.name: Thorburn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scottish Iain.
English: from a northern Middle English personal name T(h)orbern, T(h)urbern, Old Norse Thórbjörn, composed of the elements Thórr (see Thor ) + björn ‘bear, warrior’. Compare Durban .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR was born in 1190, in Chimay, Hainaut, Belgium, his father, Allard III de Chimay, was 30 and his mother, Mathilde de Quierzy, was 31. He had at least 1 daughter with Agnès DU THOUR. He died in 1226, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR est né en 1190, à Chimay, Hainaut, Belgique, son père, Allard III de Chimay, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Quierzy, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Agnès DU THOUR. Il est décédé en 1226, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR 1190 in Chimay, Hennegau, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Allard III de Chimay 30 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Quierzy 31. Er hatte mit Agnès DU THOUR mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1226 im Alter von 36 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR è nato il nel 1190 nel Chimay, Hainaut, Belgio, il suo padre, Allard III de Chimay, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Quierzy, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Agnès DU THOUR. Morì nel 1226, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.Chimay, Hainaut, Belgique: ベルギーヘイナトチメイ
ja.lifeSummary: Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOURが1190年にベルギーヘイナトチメイで生まれた時，父Allard III de Chimayは30歳，母Mathilde de Quierzyは31歳であった。彼はAgnès DU THOURとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1226年に36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR(이)가 1190년 벨기에 하인오트 치메이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Allard III de Chimay(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Quierzy(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Agnès DU THOUR(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1226년 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR nasceu em 1190, em Chimay, Hainaut, Bélgica, seu pai, Allard III de Chimay, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Quierzy, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Agnès DU THOUR. Ele faleceu em 1226, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR родился в 1190 г. в местности чимеи, ханаут, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Allard III de Chimay было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Quierzy, 31. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Agnès DU THOUR. Он умер в 1226 г. в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Ier DE CHIMAY DE THOUR nació en 1190, en Chimay, Hainaut, Bélgica, su papá, Allard III de Chimay, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Quierzy, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Agnès DU THOUR. Murió en 1226, a la edad de 36 años.
